title: Flamingo/Spoonbill - Software update for standalone headset
scenario: DFU (software update) can be performed successfully for a standalone headset not paired with a charge case via Device Settings Software Update tab
steps: 1. Ensure the headset is powered on and not paired with a charge case (standalone mode).
2. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app and navigate to the Home screen.
3. Tap the update button displayed on the device Home screen.
4. Verify that the Device Settings screen opens with the Software Update tab expanded.
5. Confirm that only one "Update" button is shown on the Software Update screen.
6. Tap the Update button to initiate the DFU process.
7. Wait for the DFU process to complete without interruption.
expected: The DFU process completes successfully. The headset is updated to the latest firmware version and remains functional in standalone mode.
